definition:
1. to discover and make known , (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; with infinitive to give notice that . . , (Aeschines Orator):—;Pass., with participle, κατεδέδεκτο ἐοῦσα χρηστή had been proved  to be good, (Herdotus Historicus) 
2. to invent and teach, introduce, exhibit , (Aristophanes Comicus); with infinitive to shew how  to do, (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
